'''tadhawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobble|nobble]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobble|nobble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadhawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhæwæth|tædhæwæth]] || [[word:tædhæwæj|tædhæwæj]] || [[word:tædhæwæsh|tædhæwæsh]] || [[word:tædhæwæ|tædhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhadhawath|tadhadhawath]] || [[word:tadhadhawaj|tadhadhawaj]] || [[word:tadhadhawash|tadhadhawash]] || [[word:tadhadhawa|tadhadhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhawath|tadhawath]] || [[word:tadhawaj|tadhawaj]] || [[word:tadhawash|tadhawash]] || [[word:tadhawa|tadhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhafwath|tadhafwath]] || [[word:tadhafwaj|tadhafwaj]] || [[word:tadhafwash|tadhafwash]] || [[word:tadhafwaf|tadhafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhawatha|tadhawatha]] || [[word:tadhawaja|tadhawaja]] || [[word:tadhawasha|tadhawasha]] || [[word:tadhawaka|tadhawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhawath|tadhawath]] || [[word:tadhawaj|tadhawaj]] || [[word:tadhawash|tadhawash]] || [[word:tadhawa|tadhawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhawathal|tadhawathal]] || [[word:tadhawajal|tadhawajal]] || [[word:tadhawashal|tadhawashal]] || [[word:tadhawakal|tadhawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhawathatha|tadhawathatha]] || [[word:tadhawajaja|tadhawajaja]] || [[word:tadhawashasha|tadhawashasha]] || [[word:tadhawaka|tadhawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhawathan|tadhawathan]] || [[word:tadhawajan|tadhawajan]] || [[word:tadhawashan|tadhawashan]] || [[word:tadhawakan|tadhawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhawathaoro|tadhawathaoro]] || [[word:tadhawajaoro|tadhawajaoro]] || [[word:tadhawashaoro|tadhawashaoro]] || [[word:tadhawakaoro|tadhawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
